title: Hosted Checkout Payment Instrument
description: A payment instrument for redirect-based hosted checkout flows where the payment provider controls the entire payment experience — including payment method selection, address capture, and authorization — via an escalation to a provider-hosted UI. The platform's sole responsibility is redirecting the buyer to the `continue_url` and polling the checkout session for completion. No platform-side credential handling or SDK integration is required.

available_hosted_checkout_instrument.title: Available Hosted Checkout Instrument
available_hosted_checkout_instrument.description: Declares hosted checkout instrument availability. No constraints are supported; the provider determines eligibility within its hosted UI.

type.description: Discriminator identifying this as a hosted checkout instrument. Platforms MUST treat this as a signal that the payment flow will be completed via escalation — no token or card credential will be produced.

display_name.description: Human-readable name of the hosted checkout provider for display in platform UI (e.g., 'Razorpay Magic Checkout', 'Shop Pay', 'Klarna'). Provided by the business; SHOULD reflect the provider's official product name.

display_logo.description: HTTPS URI to the provider's logo for display in platform UI. MUST use HTTPS. Provided by the business.

credential.description: Session reference credential populated in the Complete Checkout response. Contains a correlation identifier for the provider session; this is NOT a payment token. Absent until the business processes a Complete Checkout request.
